pageContent:
# Utils

The Utils module groups shared error definitions, language metadata, and cross-cutting type declarations.

## Key Components

- `src/errors.ts`
- `src/languages.ts`
- `src/types/common.ts`
- `src/types/configuration.ts`

## Responsibilities

- Defines shared error/result primitives.
- Centralizes reusable metadata and type contracts.
title: Utils
